items.summary: 玩这个天天被身边人歧视，社区讨论环境还差搞小团体霸凌说点其他想法就被骂，就这样我还不愿意放弃吃屎给它充钱打满活动，现在沦落为人人喊打的路边老鼠乞讨生活，不想沦落到我这下场都跑远点憋玩行么

items.title: [负面] Story makes no sense, the dialogue is a mess, ther...
items.summary:
Story makes no sense, the dialogue is a mess, there is still parts of it that is not translated, and the very beginning flashes by so damn fast its like how the hell do you expect to follow along and stay interested...
Get actual translators, not GPT. Whatever GPT version they're using, its highly likely a very old version. Cause again it didn't make sense in dialogue or story, I lost interest before the first battle in the game. 

Hard pass.

items.title: [正面] The gameplay is a hit or miss. It's a roguelike ca...
items.summary:
The gameplay is a hit or miss. It's a roguelike cardgame, if you are not sure wether or not you're gonna like it, give the game a try.
The Artstyle is beautiful, both during gameplay and outside of it. There is alot of  sexualization of characters, which for me is a letdown (sexualization is only in the game for a cheap way to make profit. Instead, use good character design (which they have) and good character stories (which i don't know if they have, haven't played the game long enough) to sell characters).
The story, as of now, is translated using AI. This results in some grammer mistakes, and sometimes untranslated words, though those untranslated words were (probably) not important.
The game does have alot of terms that you have to memorise, which makes the gameplay difficult. However, this will probably be easier over time, when you familiarise yourself with said terms.

On the one hand, find it hard to recommend this game to anyone. This is because of the massive amount of sexualization, because the gameplay is so niche, and because of the grammer mistakes. 
However, most people don't mind the sexualization. The grammer mistakes are minimal, and will get better as the game gets more developed (They are currently working on unifying the terminology, and rumors are that the developers plan to make a fully man-made english translation). And ofcourse, some people might like the gameplay. Therefore, i will recommend the game anyway.

Edit: changed 'fanservice' to 'sexualization'.
